plan_summary: Replace the hardcoded status bar text 'All systems operational' with 'Agent System Online' in the Dashboard component. This is a simple string replacement with no logic or feature changes.

files.description: Find the status bar element containing the text 'All systems operational' and replace it with 'Agent System Online'. This is a single-line string replacement in the JSX markup.

integration_notes: The Dashboard component is already imported in App.js and routed to /dashboard. No backend changes, routing changes, or new dependencies are needed. The status bar text update is purely a frontend display change with no impact on functionality or data flow.
testing_instructions: 1. Navigate to http://localhost:3000/dashboard in the browser (ensure you are logged in). 2. Locate the status bar at the top or designated status area of the Dashboard. 3. Verify that the text now displays 'Agent System Online' instead of 'All systems operational'. 4. No additional testing needed as this is a static text change with no logic changes.
